title: Standard Flow Multiplexed Proteomics (SFloMPro)-An Accessible Alternative to NanoFlow Based Shotgun Proteomics.
author: Orsburn BC Miller SD Jenkins CJ
content: S-EPMC8788518 PMC8788518 Standard Flow Multiplexed Proteomics (SFloMPro)-An Accessible Alternative to NanoFlow Based Shotgun Proteomics. Multiplexed proteomics using isobaric tagging allows for simultaneously comparing the proteomes of multiple samples. In this technique, digested peptides from
